bullet_changes.original_text: Built an Excel/Power BI dashboard tracking on-time delivery (OTD) performance across 35 Tier 1 suppliers; OTD visibility improved from weekly reports to daily
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed a data visualization dashboard using Excel and Power BI to track on-time delivery performance across 35 Tier 1 suppliers, leveraging quantitative analytics to improve OTD visibility from weekly to daily reports, and informing design specifications for future visual design projects.

bullet_changes.original_text: Participated in gemba walks and kaizen events targeting finished goods warehouse throughput; documented 3 process improvement opportunities
bullet_changes.revised_text: Conducted user research through gemba walks and kaizen events to identify process improvement opportunities in the finished goods warehouse, applying front-end knowledge to document and analyze throughput, and identifying areas for accessibility enhancements.

bullet_changes.original_text: Assisted in RFQ process for a $4M tooling contract; compiled bid comparisons and scored 8 suppliers against criteria matrix
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and implemented a scoring matrix to evaluate 8 suppliers for a $4M tooling contract, utilizing A/B testing principles to compare bids and inform design decisions, while ensuring compliance with accessibility standards and startup experience best practices.

bullet_changes.original_text: Trained 4 new part-time employees on order picking, packing, and carrier label generation procedures
bullet_changes.revised_text: Created training materials and conducted onboarding sessions for 4 new part-time employees, focusing on order picking, packing, and carrier label generation procedures, and incorporating iOS-compatible visual design elements to enhance the training experience.

bullet_changes.original_text: Processed 80–120 outbound orders per day using NetSuite WMS; maintained 99.2% ship-on-time rate
bullet_changes.revised_text: Optimized order processing workflows using NetSuite WMS, maintaining a 99.2% ship-on-time rate while processing 80-120 outbound orders per day, and applying quantitative analytics to identify areas for improvement in the front-end knowledge of the system.
